title: Op call (command plane request)
description: One envelope for every mutation in the lab. Humans and agents call the identical op (named-op symmetry). Audit commits to the lake BEFORE the effect is acknowledged; if the audit write fails, the op does not run.

id.description: Client-minted idempotency key; re-send after network failure is safe.

op.description: Namespaced op name from ops.json (agent.restart, task.claim, attention.resolve, ...).

args.description: Op-specific arguments; typed per ops.json entry (JSON Schema fragments, ajv-validated with format assertion ON).

reason.description: Audited verbatim (render-time sanitized — treat as untrusted text; never paste secrets); required by ops that declare requires_reason.

dry_run.description: Validate + lane/authz check + executor liveness + intent audit (stamped dry_run), NO effect. Result carries status: applied with result.dry_run: true. The test affordance for ops whose real effect cannot run on disposables (ops.json testable: dry-run-only).
